xml.specific_character:
Cheeta ui_actor_portrets_gf2_cheeta
Cheeta gf2_cheeta csky stalker_terrain characters_voice\human\woman\ 15000 5000 -1 actors\gf2_cheeta\gf2_cheeta
[spawn] \n wpn_mp7_cheeta \n ammo_9x19_ap = 6 \n #include "gameplay\supplies\character_items.xml" #include "gameplay\supplies\character_food.xml" #include "gameplay\supplies\character_drugs_2.xml"
#include "gameplay\character_criticals.xml" gf2_cheeta_greet gf2_cheeta_misc gf2_cheeta_recruitment gf2_cheeta_dismiss actor_break_dialog
